jd_text: Investment AVP / VP – Private Equity (SME & Real Estate Focus) Location: Dubai, UAE We are working with a dynamic and growing private investment platform focused on SME investments and real estate opportunities across the Middle East and international markets. The firm follows a hands-on, value-driven approach and is seeking an AVP / VP to play a key role in deal execution, origination, and portfolio growth. This is an opportunity to join a lean, entrepreneurial team with significant exposure to decision-making and a clear path toward senior leadership. Key Responsibilities Deal Origination & Evaluation Source and evaluate investment opportunities across SMEs and real estate sectors Develop investment theses and lead financial analysis (LBO, DCF, scenario modelling) Conduct commercial, financial, and strategic due diligence Present investment recommendations to senior stakeholders Transaction Execution Lead end-to-end deal execution, including structuring, negotiation, and closing Manage external advisors (legal, financial, technical) throughout the transaction lifecycle Support capital structuring across equity and debt Portfolio Management & Value Creation Work closely with portfolio companies to drive growth and operational improvements Monitor performance, support strategic initiatives, and prepare investor reporting Contribute to exit planning and execution Candidate Profile 5–10 years’ experience in private equity, investment banking, or a related field Strong experience working with SMEs (core requirement) Proven exposure to real estate transactions or investments Demonstrated track record in deal execution and financial modelling Strong commercial judgment and ability to operate in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment Experience interacting with senior stakeholders and managing multiple workstreams What’s on Offer High-impact role within a growing investment platform Significant deal exposure across both SME and real estate investments Clear progression toward Principal-level responsibilities Competitive compensation, with performance incentives Salary banding AVP - 35k/40k AED per month + bonus + carry VP - 40/45K AED per month + bonus + carry
